data.body:
RESCOPE + CLOSE rationale (operator-approved 2026-07-18).

The DETERMINISTIC half of E2 was designed and built: the seeded-defect mutant corpus (runs/e2_mutant_corpus.jsonl), pre-registered thresholds (runs/e2_thresholds.json), the mutation-assembly script (assemble_e2_mutants.py), the benchmark driver seams incl. store-clone isolation + emit_baseline run-validity guard (run_e2_benchmark.py), the pure counting helpers (e2_counting.py), and golden/synthetic tests (test_e2_counting.py, test_e2_benchmark.py). It lives as WIP in the cal-e2 worktree on branch calib/6982-e2 and is intentionally NOT landed on main (the harness only exists to drive the rejected batch).

The EXPENSIVE LLM BATCH BASELINE (the ~100-run live current-gate sweep over the mutant/control corpus and its e2_baseline.json / e2_run_validity.json / e2_verdicts.jsonl outputs) is PERMANENTLY REJECTED on cost. It is SUPERSEDED by story d8a5 (change #798, MERGED): the standing per-criterion effectiveness recorder criterion_effectiveness.py (on main), which accumulates the same detection / blocking-FP signal from real production reviews at $0 marginal LLM cost. History-MINING is also dead: only ~4 plan-v3 sidecar baselines exist vs ~200 needed (the impact_model_version bump stranded the history). No batch was run; no LLM eval spend was incurred.
